title: Alm's Bewitchment Tweaks
description: This Datapack lowers salt spawn rate, adjusts drops for mobs and overall increases spawn rate of some mobs
body:
Bewitchment is a mod with quite the lackluster config, not a lot of things can be adjusted and a lot things are broken.

The amount of salt that is spawned is absolutely abysmal and this Datapack lowers its spawn rate.

Many mobs also have their drops increased and hellhounds now spawn in BetterNether biomes

See the changelog for more info
